word: H7375 - רֻטֲפַשׁ - ruṭăphash - roo-taf-ash' - Be fresh

sections.paragraph:
Original: רטפשׁ

Transliteration: rûṭăphash

Phonetic: roo-taf-ash'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Niphal) to grow fresh, be grown fresh

Origin: a root compounded from H7373 and H2954

TWOT entry: 2157

Part(s) of speech: Verb
